brief: Add a Dronefleet MAVLink dependency and API contract inside an existing OpenSensorHub addon baseline without replacing the repository topology.
constraints: Integrate into the existing osh-addons baseline.
Preserve baseline activator, descriptor, and system extension points unless an accepted amendment replaces them.
Do not create a standalone Gradle project root.
Do not add top-level Gradle wrapper or settings files that conflict with QA source substitution.
acceptance_obligations: The implementation builds in the composite QA environment.
The delivered files extend the accepted baseline topology.
QA build configuration reaches test execution before integration behavior is judged.
forbidden_moves: creating a sibling osh-core root inside the addon deliverable
replacing existing baseline classes with unrelated clean-room class names

evidence: QA source substitution enabled for osh-addons
QA failure: duplicate root element during Gradle configuration

validation_findings.message: Standalone Gradle project shape conflicts with brownfield composite QA topology.
